layoutRules.background: OneKey green should be a strong first-viewport signal. It can be full-bleed, a major block, a frame, or a dominant panel depending on the layout.
layoutRules.typography: Use Roobert-Bold or MiSans-Bold for titles. Use Roobert-SemiBold or MiSans-Semibold for body labels and CTA text. Keep line count short and avoid decorative typography.
layoutRules.contentPanels: Use clean white or green information zones. Layouts may vary, but the hierarchy must stay simple, spacious, and immediately scannable.
layoutRules.brandLockup: Prefer official logomark or wordmark assets. Use the logomark with a text label only when a layout needs the App context.
layoutRules.language: Use MiSans for Chinese and Roobert for English. Do not mix fonts inside the same language block.
avoid: uncontrolled text rendered inside diffusion images

integration-grid.purpose: Announce multiple supported apps, chains, partners, tokens, or markets.

single-partner.purpose: Announce one partner, app, chain, token, or market.

guide-cover.purpose: Cover image for educational/security explainer content.

perps-market.purpose: Announce a supported perpetual contract market or leveraged market.
